activity_question: What famous song was featured in the musical 'Annie Get Your Gun'?

title: Dancing to Dvořák's Slavic Rhythms
story: Toes tapped and hearts soared as Antonín Dvořák's lively 'Slavonic Dances' filled the air for the first time in 1879. title: Handshake Heals a 30-Year Divide
story: Two powerful leaders shook hands, and history changed. In 1989, Soviet President Mikhail Gorbachev traveled to Beijing. There, he met with Chinese leader Deng Xiaoping on May 16. story: The halls of the US Congress buzzed with excitement. Queen Elizabeth II stood before American lawmakers, making history. In 1991, she became the first British monarch ever to address this powerful group. Her speech on May 16 celebrated the strong friendship between the two nations.

story: King Henry III of England had big plans for Westminster Abbey. On May 16, 1220, he laid the first stone for a new Lady Chapel. story: Cheers erupted as Abraham Lincoln became the Republican Party's choice for president in 1860. On May 16, delegates gathered in Chicago to pick their candidate. title: Zeppelin's Unlucky Launch
story: Disaster struck in 1911 when the Zeppelin airship Deutschland II met an unfortunate end. As the massive flying machine attempted to leave its hangar in Dusseldorf on May 16, something went terribly wrong.
